case_title: CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS MORMAN JOSEPH L.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORMAN JOSEPH L.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MORMAN JOSEPH L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORMAN JOSEPH L. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,551.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
